summary: R-1 resolved within the accepted scope. Failure path: L2g proves the form remains functional on the native datalist, saves successfully, makes no ineffective same-document retry, and recovers after a document reload (scripts/smoke.mjs:892-943). Delayed swap: focus is transferred only when the fallback still owns it, and L2e/L2f cover both focus-stealing and focus-loss regressions (src/features/modifications/header-name-input.tsx:104-134; scripts/smoke.mjs:827-890). Degraded coverage: committed verification records all three tests passing plus negative controls that fail when each protection is removed (docs/reviews/ui-polish/verification.md:102-120). The fix introduces no new critical or high issue.
triage: Clean verdict: note it in your report and COMMIT this artifact with the next bookkeeping commit.
